_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 and 2 in Canada.

_contextSnippet: When analyzing the EQ-5D-5L, we found that a high proportion of patients reported some degree of pain/discomfort (66% for NF1 and 73% NF2, respectively) and anxiety/depression (61% and 68% for NF1 and NF2, respectively).
details: High proportion of patients reported pain/discomfort (66% NF1, 73% NF2) and anxiety/depression (61% NF1, 68% NF2). Mean VAS score was 74.5±23 for NF1 and 64.2±21 for NF2 (P=0.05). Mean health utility score was 0.73±0.24 for NF1 and 0.65±0.25 for NF2 (P=0.16).
